summary: The Middle East remains in acute crisis as US and Iranian forces exchange strikes following Iranian attacks on American military sites, with Israel simultaneously escalating operations in Lebanon and Gaza despite international calls for de-escalation. In tech, major developments include Anthropic's planned stock market listing and Nvidia's new AI chip announcement, while geopolitical tech competition intensifies with US restrictions on AI chip shipments to Chinese firms. Beyond these dominant themes, significant stories span democratic transitions in Colombia and Ethiopia, military cooperation agreements in Myanmar and Hungary's constitutional amendments, plus humanitarian crises from Sudan's drug shortages to China's mining disaster.
